loan_type.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

root.sql:
select pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as member_name , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth, localtimestamp) as age , pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date, localtimestamp) as age_mem , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY' ) as approve_tdate , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_member_retire(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) , 'SD MONTH YYYY' ) as retire_date , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth , 'SD' ) as birth_date , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth , 'MONTH' ) as birth_moth , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth , 'YYYY' ) as birth_year
, sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_long , sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_net , sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_amount , sc_mem_m_member_work_info.long_group , sc_mem_m_member_work_info.long_line , sc_mem_m_member_work_info.long_department , sc_mem_m_member_work_info.long_office , sc_mem_m_member_work_info.long_division , sc_mem_m_member_work_info.long_workgroup , sc_mem_m_member_work_info.long_subdivision , sc_mem_m_member_work_info.long_section
, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name
, sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no , sc_mem_m_member_address.mooban , sc_mem_m_member_address.moo , sc_mem_m_member_address.road , sc_mem_m_member_address.soi , pka_com_function.fp_get_sub_district_name ( sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol ) as tambol , pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code , sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code )as district , pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code )as province , sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code , sc_mem_m_member_address.postcode , sc_mem_m_member_address.telephone
, (select maximum_loan_amount from sc_lon_m_rule where loan_type = '!loan_type!') as maximum_loan_amount , (select loan_type from sc_lon_m_rule where loan_type = '!loan_type!') as loan_type , (select loan_type_description from sc_lon_m_rule where loan_type = '!loan_type!') as loan_type_description
, (select loan_interest_rate * 100 from sc_lon_m_int_step_rate where loan_type = '!loan_type!' and effective_date = (select max(effective_date) from sc_lon_m_int_step_rate tab where loan_type = sc_lon_m_int_step_rate.loan_type) ) as loan_interest_rate
, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( current_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY' ) as requestment_tdate , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( current_date , 'SD' ) as requestment_day , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( current_date , 'MONTH' ) as requestment_month , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( current_date , 'YYYY' ) as requestment_year
, sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_amount , sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock
, (select bank_acc_no from sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno where membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and paid_loan = '1') as bank_acc_no
, (select bank_name from sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno , sc_acc_m_ucf_bank_branch where membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.bank_id = sc_acc_m_ucf_bank_branch.bank_id and sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.bank_branch_id = sc_acc_m_ucf_bank_branch.bank_branch_id and paid_loan = '1' ) as bank_branch
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_member_address , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_member_work_info , sc_mem_m_share_mem where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0' /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '01960'

r_port_loan_req_form_nest.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_period , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_calcint_date , 'dd/mm/yyyy' ) as last_pay_date , sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance , sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount
FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_contract WHERE sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > '0' and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = {0} /*WHERE*/ --AND sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = '06541' ORDER BY sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no
